Question: On 15-8-1995 at 2:55 PM a child is born at
Trivandrum, Kerala, India. Sunrise- 6:18AM (1ST), Sunset-
6:35 PM (1ST). Find the correct time ofbirth.
Answer:
Day duration = 12:17 (12 hrs 17 min)
I Yama =12:17/8=737/8=92:07(92min07sec)
Earth Tatva = (30/90) x 92:07 = 30:42 (30 min 42 sec)
Water Tatva = (24/90) x 92:07 = 24:34

44 Secrets o(Birth Time Rectification
Fire Tatva = (18/90) 92:07 = 18:25
X
Air Tatva = (J2/90) 92:07 = 12:17
X
Sky Tatva = (06/90) 92:07 = 06:08
X
After 2:55, i.e. 14:55 (1ST) is the given birth time. On
converting it to Local Mean Time (LMT) -
Birth time = 14:55 - 22 min (for Trivandrum) = 14:33
(LMT)
Thus the time duration from sun rise to birth time = 14:33
(LMT) - 5:56 (LMT) = 8:37 (8 hrs 37 min)
From sunrise 5 yama (7.5 hrs approx) already passed. Birth
took place in 6th yama of the day. We know that 6th yama is
an even yama. On even yama counting of tatva should be in
